title: Background automation Phase 2: async dispatch, auto-docs, agent summarization
description:
Follow-up to #168 Phase 1 (services/background.rs).

Phase 1 delivered:
- BackgroundJob trait + JobScheduler (sync, tick-driven)
- MemoryConsolidationJob (short-term prune + archival dedup)
- 15 tests, all passing

Phase 2 scope:
1. Async dispatch: wrap JobScheduler::tick in a tokio::spawn loop; add idle-detection signal from the session layer so tick only fires when the agent is idle.
2. Auto-documentation maintenance: a BackgroundJob that reads CLAUDE.md / MEMORY.md, compares against recent session activity (MemoryDb::get_recent_sessions), and appends discovered project facts. Respects MAX_ENTRYPOINT_BYTES from memdir::entrypoint.
3. Periodic agent summarization: a BackgroundJob that uses coordinator::Coordinator::dispatch (Phase 2 of #507) to spawn a summarizer subagent over the last N sessions, writing the result into archival_memory.

Blocked by coordinator Phase 2 (#507) for item 3.
